DashboardPage.contactUrlInvalid: Contact link must start with http:// or https://
DashboardPage.descTooLong: Description can be at most 300 characters
DashboardPage.quotaInvalid: Enter a whole number from 1 to 200 for the quota (leave blank = unlimited)
DashboardPage.updateHint: Clear cache and update to the latest version
DashboardPage.removeConfirm: Remove “{{name}}” from your history? The data is kept for a while — it just won't show here anymore.
DashboardPage.queueTimeHint: Before this time, drop-in players can view but can't queue to play yet
DashboardPage.descPlaceholder: Tell players about your session: level, fees, notes… (e.g. Advanced, levels 4–6, $150 per session, bring your own racket)
DashboardPage.contactHint: Players see the description and a “Contact host” button on the home page (link a LINE group, sign-up form, etc.). You can change it later under “⚙️ Settings”.
DashboardPage.quotaHint: people (leave blank = unlimited; sign-ups still allowed when full — you decide who to accept)
DashboardPage.signupHint: Players can sign up and message you right from the home page; they join only after you approve. Anyone with the password still joins directly, no review needed.
DashboardPage.atOpenLimit: You've reached the concurrent session limit ({{max}}). Please end or close an old one before starting a new one.
